## Priority

<!-- How critical is this bug? -->

- [ ] 🔴 Critical — App crash, data loss, scoring incorrect
- [ ] 🟠 High — Major feature broken, workaround difficult
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — Feature partially broken, workaround available
- [ ] 🟢 Low — Minor issue, cosmetic only

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I've searched existing issues for duplicates
- [ ] I've provided all necessary information
- [ ] I've included steps to reproduce
- [ ] I've tested with the latest version
- [ ] I understand this is voluntary work by maintainers

---

**Thank you for reporting! We'll investigate this soon.** 🙏
